parameters.content:
## Critical Ticket Detector
POST /webhook/critical-ticket-detected
Body minimum: { ticket_id }
Workflow fetches ticket details and sends email alert.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ (() => { const ticketId = $json.ticket_id || 'N/A'; const title = $json.title || 'Critical Ticket'; const status = $json.status || 'open'; const priority = String($json.priority || 'critical').toUpperCase(); const assignee = $json.assignee || 'Unassigned'; const slaInfo = $json.sla_status || $json.sla_risk || 'Not available'; const ticketUrl = $json.ticket_url || (($env.FRONTEND_BASE_URL || 'http://localhost:3000') + '/tickets/' + ticketId); const severity = priority === 'CRITICAL' ? 'Critical' : 'High'; const themeColor = severity === 'Critical' ? 'C62828' : 'EF6C00'; return { '@type': 'MessageCard', '@context': 'https://schema.org/extensions', summary: `ITSM critical ticket alert - ${ticketId}`, themeColor, title: `${severity} Ticket Alert`, sections: [{ activityTitle: `${ticketId} - ${title}`, text: `[Open ticket](${ticketUrl})`, facts: [{ name: 'Ticket', value: ticketId }, { name: 'Status', value: status }, { name: 'Priority', value: priority }, { name: 'Assignee', value: assignee }, { name: 'SLA', value: slaInfo }, { name: 'Trace', value: $json.trace_id || 'N/A' }], markdown: true }], potentialAction: [{ '@type': 'OpenUri', 'name': 'Open Ticket', targets: [{ os: 'default', uri: ticketUrl }] }] }; })() }}

parameters.content:
## Error Handling
Any real failure routes here. Success responses are ignored.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { title: 'Ticket critique détecté : ' + $json.ticket_id, body: ($json.title || ('Ticket ' + $json.ticket_id)) + ' — Priorité critique, assigné à ' + ($json.assignee || 'N/A'), severity: 'critical', event_type: 'ticket_created', user_id: null, source: 'n8n_workflow', link: '/tickets/' + $json.ticket_id, dedupe_key: 'critical_ticket_' + $json.ticket_id + '_' + new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 13) } }}
